collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Letter describing the claims of the writer's brother-in-law on the half of a house that was sold by the mother to her daughter, the writer's wife. Join by Oded Zinger. For a detailed edition and analysis, see Zinger (2018), "'One Hour He Is a Christian and the Next He Is a Muslim!' A Family Dispute from the Cairo Geniza." Note that Goitein in at least one place mistakenly cites T-S 8J20.26 as T-S 8J20.16 (Med Soc 2:393, 612). He may also discuss this document (Med Soc 3:179, 464; EMS).
description_he: מכתב המתאר תביעות גיסו על מחצית בית שמכרה האם לבתה (אשת הכותב). הסכסוך המשפחתי מתועד בפרק: 'שעה אחת הוא נוצרי, ושעה אחרת מוסלמי!'
